mapper.sql: id, article_id, user_id, content, parent_id, is_deleted, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar as userAvatar FROM blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar as userAvatar FROM blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar as userAvatar FROM blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalComments FROM blog_comment WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar as userAvatar FROM blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.parent_id, c.is_deleted, c.create_time, u.username, u.avatar as userAvatar FROM blog_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_comment (article_id, user_id, content, parent_id, is_deleted) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_comment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
